calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Petitioners: John Montenero and Nataliya Montenero, are present in pro per with the minor: Nicole Boyko, were sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Nicole Montenero.
Decree signed in open court.
